claims.summary: The telemetry subscriber persists lifecycle state and reconnects with bounded backoff.
claims.disposition: Verified current connection, disconnect, valid-payload, error, and reconnect receipts plus backoff tests.

claims.summary: Shared-state write-lock waiting or holding may delay telemetry integration.
claims.disposition: Verified current telemetry integration health measures prewrite, lock wait, and lock hold separately; the natural campaign observed threshold crossings without claiming timing caused felt friction.

claims.summary: A delayed integration path should be tested against Ping and Close responsiveness.
claims.disposition: Routed to a bounded mock WebSocket or scheduler replay; deliberately rejected inducing a five-second live stall.

claims.summary: Artifact scanning may be part of the expensive work that precedes shared-state integration.
claims.disposition: Verified scanning and lambda classification occur before the write lock and are separately visible in prewrite pipeline timing.
